name: Sloppy Joe Tamales
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Tempeh burgers as per the Basic Masa Dough recipe.
2. Crumble the Tempeh burgers into small pieces.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the following ingredients to make the filling:
- 1 1/2 cups Tomato paste
- 2 tablespoons Vinegar (brown rice)
- 3 tablespoons Tamari
- 5 tablespoons Canola or safflower oil
- 3 tablespoons Onion flakes, dried
- 2 tablespoons Oregano
- 1 1/2 tablespoons Basil
4. Stir the ingredients together until well combined.
5. Fill and cook tamales according to the "Tamales: Basic Procedure".
6. Per serving (2 tamales): 452 calories, 12g protein, 277mg sodium, 78g carbohydrates, 9g fat, 0mg cholesterol, 69mg calcium.
Vegetarian Gourmet, Summer 1993/MM by DEEANNE
